sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الْوُلُوجَ إِلَى السُّوقِ الشَّعْبِيِّ يُشْبِهُ الِانْغِمَاسَ فِي مِشْهَدٍ بَصَرِيٍّ مُتَعَدِّدِ الْأَلْوَانِ، حَيْثُ تُشَكِّلُ تَدَرُّجَاتُ الزَّعْفَرَانِ وَالْكُرْكُمِ الْوَاهِجَةُ سِمْفُونِيَّةً مَرْئِيَّةً.
sentences.translation: Ulazak na narodnu pijacu sličan je uranjanju u višebojni vizuelni prizor, gdje blistave nijanse šafrana i kurkume stvaraju vidljivu simfoniju.
sentences.translationEn: Entering the traditional market is akin to immersing oneself in a multi-colored visual scene, where the vibrant gradients of saffron and turmeric form a visual symphony.

sentences.arabic: يَزِنُ التَّاجِرُ، بِيَدَيْهِ الْمُجَعَّدَتَيْنِ بِفِعْلِ الزَّمَنِ، الْحُبُوبَ وَالْبُقُولِيَّاتِ كَمَا لَوْ كَانَ يَقِيسُ جَوْهَرَ الْوَقْتِ وَالتَّارِيخِ نَفْسِهِ.
sentences.translation: Trgovac, rukama naboranim od vremena, vaga žitarice i mahunarke kao da mjeri samu suštinu vremena i historije.
sentences.translationEn: The merchant, with hands wrinkled by time, weighs grains and legumes as if he were measuring the very essence of time and history itself.

sentences.arabic: فِي هَذَا الْمَتَاهِ مِنَ النَّكَهَاتِ، يَحُلُّ مَفْهُومُ "الْبَرَكَةِ" فِي كُلِّ صَفْقَةٍ، مِمَّا يُؤَكِّدُ عَلَى الْبُعْدِ الْأَخْلَاقِيِّ لِلتِّجَارَةِ وَالِاسْتِهْلَاكِ.
sentences.translation: U ovom lavirintu okusa, koncept 'bereket' ili blagoslova prisutan je u svakoj nagodbi, naglašavajući moralnu dimenziju trgovine i potrošnje.
sentences.translationEn: In this labyrinth of flavors, the concept of 'Barakah' or blessing resides in every transaction, emphasizing the ethical dimension of commerce and consumption.

sentences.arabic: تَصِلُ الْمَحَاصِيلُ الطَّازَجَةُ، الَّتِي قُطِفَتْ مَعَ بَزُوغِ الْفَجْرِ، إِلَى الْبَسَاطَاتِ وَهِيَ مَا تَزَالُ تَحْمِلُ هَمَسَاتِ النَّدَى مِنَ الرِّيفِ الْخَصِيبِ.
sentences.translation: Svježi usjevi, ubrani u praskozorje, stižu na tezge dok još uvijek nose šapat rose sa plodnih polja.
sentences.translationEn: Fresh produce, harvested at the break of dawn, arrives at the stalls still carrying the whispers of dew from the fertile countryside.

sentences.arabic: تَتَجَلَّى الْكِيمْيَاءُ الطَّهْوِيَّةُ عِنْدَمَا تَتَحَوَّلُ هَذِهِ الْعَنَاصِرُ الْخَامُ عَبْرَ النَّارِ وَالصَّبْرِ إِلَى أَطْبَاقٍ تُغَذِّي الْجَسَدَ وَالرُّوحَ مَعًا.
sentences.translation: Kulinarska alhemija se manifestuje kada se ovi sirovi elementi, kroz vatru i strpljenje, transformišu u jela koja hrane i tijelo i duh zajedno.
sentences.translationEn: Culinary alchemy manifests when these raw elements are transformed through fire and patience into dishes that nourish both the body and the spirit.

sentences.arabic: يُوَفِّرُ إِيقَاعُ السُّوقِ، بِمُسَاوَمَاتِهِ الْمُنْتَظِمَةِ وَرَنِينِ الْأَوَانِي النُّحَاسِيَّةِ، نَبْضًا يَحْفَظُ لِلْمَدِينَةِ نَسِيجَهَا الْحَضَرِيَّ.
sentences.translation: Ritam pijace, sa svojim redovnim cjenkanjima i zveckanjem bakrenog posuđa, pruža puls koji čuva urbani nivo grada.
sentences.translationEn: The rhythm of the market, with its rhythmic haggling and clinking of copper pots, provides a pulse that sustains the city's urban fabric.

sentences.arabic: وَفِي نِهَايَةِ الْمَطَافِ، يُعَدُّ فِعْلُ اخْتِيَارِ الْمُكَوِّنَاتِ طَقْسًا تَبْجِيلِيًّا لِعَطَاءِ الْأَرْضِ وَشَهَادَةً عَلَى اسْتِمْرَارِيَّةِ الْحِكْمَةِ الْمَوْرُوثَةِ عَنِ الْأَجْدَادِ.
sentences.translation: U konačnici, čin odabira sastojaka predstavlja ritualno odavanje počasti darovima zemlje i svjedočanstvo o kontinuitetu mudrosti naslijeđene od predaka.
sentences.translationEn: Ultimately, the act of selecting ingredients is a ritualistic homage to the land’s bounty and a testament to the continuity of wisdom inherited from ancestors.
